heading: Exclusive economic zone
label: 107 Exclusive economic zone
text: In this title, the term “exclusive economic zone” means the zone established by Presidential Proclamation 5030 of ( note).March 10, 198316 U.S.C. 1453
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)10746:2101(10a).
